channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: The Sims 4 Update: Official Patch Notes (July 21st, 2026 Release) - Sims Community
item.description:
1. The Sims 4 Update: Official Patch Notes (July 21st, 2026 Release)  Sims Community
  2. The Sims 4 July 2026 Patch Overview: Autosave & Other New Features  Sims Community
  3. After 12 Years, EA Is (Mostly) Nudging The Sims 4 In The Right Direction  GameSpot
  4. The Sims 4 Unveiled New Gameplay Features & Improvements Coming in the Next Base Game Update  GameSpace.com
  5. The Sims 4 Developers Will Take Care of Long Gaming Session Enthusiasts - The Game Will Be Optimized for PC and Consoles  ixbt.games
